message: Major CMS Update! Including new One-Click Installer, Theme Settings UI overhaul, and security fixes.
changelog: Added robust One-Click Update Wizard directly in the Admin Panel.
Overhauled the Theme Settings user interface to look elegant and responsive.
Fixed critical permission errors relating to missing database columns.
Resolved bugs with the install.php and run_migration.php scripts.
Implemented database safety logic to prevent dashboard crashes during upgrades.
